events.name: New York Knicks at Brooklyn Nets

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns had 26 points and 15 rebounds, and the New York Knicks outlasted the Brooklyn Nets 93-92 on Friday night for their fifth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks edge Nets 93-92 for their 14th straight victory in the New York rivalry

headlines.description: — Jalen Duren scored 23 points as the Detroit Pistons beat the Golden State Warriors 115-101 on Friday night in a game missing two of the NBA's biggest stars.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Duren scores 23 points as Pistons beat Golden State in a game missing star power

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant scored 25 points, Jabari Smith Jr. added 23 and the Houston Rockets snapped Atlanta's 11-game winning streak with a 117-95 victory over the Hawks on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rockets snap Hawks' 11-game win streak with a 117-95 rout as Durant scores 25

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 30 points, Luka Garza added a season-high 22 points and the Boston Celtics used a fourth-quarter rally to defeat the Memphis Grizzlies 117-112 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaylen Brown has 30 points as Celtics rally to defeat Grizzlies 117-112

headlines.description: — Jerami Grant made a 3-pointer with 22.2 seconds left and the Portland Trail Blazers escaped with a 108-104 win over the Minnesota Timberwolves on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grant hits late 3 and Trail Blazers beat Timberwolves 108-104 for third straight win

headlines.description: — Jamal Murray scored 31 points, Nikola Jokic made a go-ahead jumper with 45 seconds left and the Denver Nuggets held on for a 121-115 victory over the Toronto Raptors on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jamal Murray scores 31 points to help lift Nuggets past Raptors 121-115
